examples: Beth spoke of Dr. Hammer in laudatory terms.
The New York Times has this very laudatory article about your retirement.
On the whole, however, even these laudatory critics showed themselves uninterested in the stories that this fiction told, or in their significance.
He was recently the subject of a laudatory New York Times article profiling his work.
Casey were the subject of a laudatory retrospective last week in Investors Business Daily ( see the attached).
